---
title: ""
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
toc: false
execute:
  freeze: true
---

<br><br><br><br><br>




::: {.column-screen .hero-vibe}
::: {.hero-content}
<div class="hero-title">Learn what makes Code work.</div>
<div class="hero-subtitle">Master the tech universities don't teach.</div>

<br>

[Go to Courses](courses.qmd){.btn .hero-btn}
:::
:::

<br><br><br>

::: {.column-page #courses}
---

<br>

::: {.text-start}
# Current Course Portfolio
:::

<br>

::: {.course-grid}

::: {.card .p-5 .text-center .shadow-sm .card-flex}
<div>
## <img src="images/excel_kurs_preview_icon.png" style="height:1.2em;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:0.3em;" alt=""> Excel Course
Learn to handle data with confidence, build clean spreadsheets, and master the tools you'll actually need in a professional office environment.
</div>

[View Course Details](excel/index.qmd){.btn .btn-lg .btn-custom}
:::

::: {.card .p-5 .text-center .shadow-sm .card-flex}
<div>
## <img src="images/ae_kurs_preview_icon.webp" style="height:1.2em;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:0.3em;" alt=""> Agentic Engineering
Learn to build software at the speed of thought. Master LLMs, AI-assistants, and modern developer workflows.
</div>

[View Course Details](agentic_engineering/index.qmd){.btn .btn-lg .btn-custom}
:::

:::
:::

<br><br><br>
